metadata.title: Darjeeling District - Comprehensive Office Directory
metadata.purpose: Hierarchical office directory for Gorkhay AI to help users write letters to the correct offices.

categories.label: Sub-Divisional Officer (SDO)
categories.description: Sub-division level administration, land records, revenue matters

[Address]
